title: French Cocoa Malt Kofte
description: A French twist on traditional Turkish kofte, with the addition of cocoa powder for a rich and indulgent treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together malty flour, cocoa powder, Turkish kofte mix, and romantic rose petals.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and milk.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape into kofte.
Place the kofte on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
